song_name: Bruno Mars - When I Was Your Man - Miley Cyrus - Flowers
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Bruno Intro]
[ch]D7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]D7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G/B[/ch]


[Bruno Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
 Same bed, but it feels just a[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]
little bit bigger now[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]G7[/ch]
 Our song on the radio, but it[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Em/B[/ch]
don't sound the same[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
 When our friends talk about you all[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Dm[/ch]
it does is just tear me down[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
 Cause my heart breaks a little when[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]
I hear your name[/tab]


[Bruno Pre-chorus]
[tab]  [ch]Em/B[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]
It all just sounds like ooh, ooh, oooh,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
oooh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                             [ch]C/G[/ch]
Mmm too young, too dumb to realize[/tab]


[Miley Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]Dm[/ch]
I can buy myself flowers[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]C/B[/ch]
Write my name in the sand[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]Dm[/ch]
Talk to myself for hours[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]C/B[/ch]
Say things you don't understand[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]
I can take myself dancing[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]C/B[/ch]
And I can hold my own hand[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]E7[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
Yeah, I can love me better than you can[/tab]



[Bruno Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
 My pride, my ego, my needs and[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Dm[/ch]
my selfish ways[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]G7[/ch]
 Caused a good strong woman like you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Em/B[/ch]
to walk out my life[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
Now I'll never, never get to clean up[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Dm[/ch]
the mess I made ooh[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
 And that haunts me every time I[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
close my eyes[/tab]


[Bruno Pre-chorus]
[tab]  [ch]Em/B[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]
It all just sounds like ooh, ooh, oooh,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
oooh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                             [ch]C/G[/ch]
Mmm too young, too dumb to realize[/tab]


[Miley Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]Dm[/ch]
I can buy myself flowers[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]C/B[/ch]
Write my name in the sand[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]Dm[/ch]
Talk to myself for hours[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]C/B[/ch]
Say things you don't understand[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]
I can take myself dancing[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]C/B[/ch]
And I can hold my own hand[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]E7[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
Yeah, I can love me better than you can[/tab]



[Bruno Bridge]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
Although it hurts I'll be the first to[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Em/G[/ch]
say that I was wrong[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D7[/ch]
Oh, I know I'm probably much too late[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm7[/ch]
To try and apologize for my mistakes[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
But I just want you to know[/tab]


[Bruno/Miley Chorus]
[tab]                  [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
I hope he buys you flowers, I hope he[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
holds your hand[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
Give you all his hours when he has the[/tab]
chance

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]
I can take myself dancing[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]C/B[/ch]
And I can hold my own hand[/tab]

[tab][ch]D7[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]Fm[/ch]
Do all the things I should've done when[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
I was your man[/tab]
[tab][ch]D7[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]Fm[/ch]
Do all the things I should've done when[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
I was your man[/tab]
